name: Br. Holdings Corporation
summary: Br. Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in Japan. The company operates through four segments: Construction Business; Product Sales Business; Information Systems Business; and Real Estate Leasing Business. It primarily constructs prestressed concrete (PC) bridges and other structures; sells PC; and manufactures and sells railroad and sleepers, construction materials, and secondary concrete products. The company also provides information processing and software developing services. In addition, it rents and manages real estate properties. Br. Holdings Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
